title: poa alpigena var. domestica
intro: Poa alpigena var. domestica, also known as Mountain Bluegrass, is a type of grass native to the mountainous regions of North America. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Mountain Bluegrass include reducing stress, improving sleep quality, and supporting immune function. Mountain Bluegrass can be prepared as a herbal tea, infused oil, or tincture, and is also used in traditional medicine to treat various ailments, including digestive issues and respiratory problems.
